issue.title: Missing model selection tool functionality
issue.description: When user requested to change AI model, I attempted to use request_model_selection tool but it appears to be missing or non-functional. The user specifically asked to "change your ai model" and I offered to open model selection interface, but the tool is not available in my current function set. This prevents users from easily switching between different AI models (Claude, GPT, Gemini, etc.) through the UI.

context.expectedBehavior: Should be able to open model selection UI when user wants to change AI models
context.actualBehavior: Tool appears to be missing from available function set
reproSteps: User asks to change AI model
Bot attempts to open model selection
